name: USS PT 201
events: 22 Apr 1943 Around 1000 A/22, USS Enoree (T/Cdr. W.S. Campbell, USN), USS Charles Ausburne (T/Cdr. L.K. Reynolds, USN) and USS Spence (T/Cdr. H.J. Armstrong, Jr., USN) arrived at Gibraltar from Casablanca.
During the day the motor torpedo boats (PT boats), USS PT 201, USS PT 202, USS PT 203 and USS PT 204 were then offloaded from USS Enoree. They had been carried as deck cargo.
